challenge.title: Give each element a unique ID
challenge.description:
We also want to use jQuery to target each button with its unique ID.

Give every button a unique ID, starting from target1 and ending with target6.

Ensure that target1 through target3 are inside #left-well, and target4 through target6 are inside #right-well.

#right-well

tests.text: A button element should have the ID target1.
A button element should have the ID target2.
A button element should have the ID target3.
A button element should have the ID target4.
A button element should have the ID target5.
A button element should have the ID target6.
